single_key_string.description: Reusable shape for a one-field JSON object containing a string value.

rich_assay_value.description: Canonical assay-cell object. value is the core cell value; unit, method, and description preserve assay context for export. assay_match records the model's target/method/endpoint compatibility and best-requested-assay self-check.

rich_assay_value_match.description: Assay matching self-check. target and candidate summarize target biology, method/platform, endpoint, and units; compatible must be true only when candidate is the requested assay concept, and best_requested_assay must exactly name the requested assay that best owns the candidate column/record.
